raw:
# 认知反思

让我先执行认知纪律检查：

**信号vs噪音筛选：**
- Brent突破$100：这是DAG中一个节点的直接验证，是信号
- 油轮被击中：是信号，直接支持海峡封锁状态
- 高盛Q4预测$71：这是远期预测，与当前实际脱节，可能是噪音
- 以色列"无明确regime change计划"：与DAG中us_regime_change=100%存在张力，需要仔细分析

**锚定检查：**
- "Brent $100"感觉很大，但DAG已经预设oil_price_100=100%，所以这是确认而非新信息
- S&P -4.4%对应equity_correction阈值-5%，接近但未触及

---

```json
{
  "headline": "Brent确认突破$100后回落至$96.85；海峡封锁持续验证；伊朗60%浓缩铀半数存于伊斯法罕隧道幸存",
  "source_credibility": 0.88,
  "impacts": [
    {
      "node_id": "oil_price_100",
      "direction": "unchanged",
      "magnitude": "negligible",
      "likelihood_ratio": "1-2",
      "transmission_order": 1,
      "mechanism": "Brent已触及$100以上后回落至$96.85，节点原本100%概率，这是确认而非更新",
      "counter_argument": "回落至$96.85是否意味着$100不可持续？但节点定义是'突破'而非'维持'，已满足",
      "confidence": 0.95
    },
    {
      "node_id": "hormuz_blockade",
      "direction": "unchanged",
      "magnitude": "minor",
      "likelihood_ratio": "2-5",
      "transmission_order": 1,
      "mechanism": "多重验证：油轮被击沉、美海军拒绝护航、伊朗新领导人宣布海峡将持续关闭。节点已99%，新证据符合预期",
      "counter_argument": "美海军'拒绝护航'是否意味着美方可随时改变策略打开海峡？但伊朗主动袭击+声明关闭的组合表明封锁是伊方主导",
      "confidence": 0.92
    },
    {
      "node_id": "supply_disruption_volume",
      "direction": "up",
      "magnitude": "minor",
      "likelihood_ratio": "2-5",
      "transmission_order": 1,
      "mechanism": "Bloomberg称'millions of barrels trapped'、'biggest oil market disruption in history'，提供了中断规模的具体表述",
      "counter_argument": "缺乏具体mbpd数字，'millions trapped'可能是库存而非流量",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "node_id": "spr_coordinated_release",
      "direction": "up",
      "magnitude": "moderate",
      "likelihood_ratio": "5-10",
      "transmission_order": 1,
      "mechanism": "Al Jazeera报道IEA将释放石油储备。原预测92%，现有直接行动报道。从'预计会做'到'正在做'",
      "counter_argument": "报道未确认规模是否达300-400M bbl标准，可能是较小规模协调释放",
      "confidence": 0.78
    },
    {
      "node_id": "irgc_nuclear",
      "direction": "up",
      "magnitude": "significant",
      "likelihood_ratio": "5-10",

      "counter_argument": "60%≠90%武器级，仍需进一步浓缩。且'probably'表示不确定。存在≠将使用",
      "confidence": 0.72
    },

      "counter_argument": "Guardian来源是以色列方单方面说法，可能是战术欺骗或内部分歧的局部声音。DAG设定100%可能需下调但不应大幅修正",
      "confidence": 0.55
    },
    {
      "node_id": "iran_power_transition",
      "direction": "unchanged",
      "magnitude": "minor",
      "likelihood_ratio": "2-5",
      "transmission_order": 1,

      "counter_argument": "发表声明不等于权力稳固，可能仍在整合过程中",
      "confidence": 0.82

    {
      "node_id": "conflict_protracted",

      "magnitude": "negligible",

      "counter_argument": "强硬声明可能是谈判筹码而非实际立场",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "node_id": "shipping_insurance_collapse",
      "direction": "up",
      "magnitude": "minor",

    {

      "direction": "up",

    {
      "node_id": "minesweeping_bottleneck",
      "direction": "unchanged",
      "magnitude": "minor",
      "likelihood_ratio": "2-5",

    {
      "node_id": "qatar_lng_disrupted",

    {
      "node_id": "europe_energy_crisis",
      "direction": "up",
      "magnitude": "minor",
      "likelihood_ratio": "2-5",
      "transmission_order": 3,

      "counter_argument": "欧洲已建立替代供应链和储气能力，对卡塔尔依赖度已下降",
      "confidence": 0.55
    },
    {
      "node_id": "us_military_casualties",
      "direction": "up",
      "magnitude": "minor",
      "likelihood_ratio": "2-5",
      "transmission_order": 2,
      "mechanism": "莫杰塔巴威胁'美基地将被攻击除非关闭'，这是直接威胁美军人员的信号",
      "counter_argument": "威胁≠执行。伊朗此前多次威胁但实际攻击造成的伤亡有限",
      "confidence": 0.58
    },
    {
      "node_id": "oil_new_equilibrium",
      "direction": "unchanged",
      "magnitude": "negligible",
      "likelihood_ratio": "1-2",
      "transmission_order": 2,
      "mechanism": "高盛Q4预测$71暗示市场预期中期价格回落，与$85-100均衡区间有交集但更悲观",
      "counter_argument": "高盛预测是数月后的远期视角，与当前$96.85实际价格存在巨大gap，预测可信度存疑",
      "confidence": 0.40
    },
    {
      "node_id": "panic_inventory_build",
      "direction": "unchanged",
      "magnitude": "negligible",
      "likelihood_ratio": "1-2",
      "transmission_order": 2,
      "mechanism": "'millions of barrels trapped'暗示正常贸易流中断，可能触发下游囤积",
      "counter_argument": "trapped是供应侧问题，不直接等于需求侧囤积行为",
      "confidence": 0.50
    }
  ],
  "contradicts_current_thesis": false,
  "new_node_suggestion": {
    "node_id": "us_naval_escort_refusal",
    "description": "美海军拒绝为商船提供霍尔木兹海峡护航",

  "noise_flag": false,
  "noise_reasoning": "高盛Q4预测$71与当前市场严重脱节，作为单独数据点接近噪音级别，但整体batch包含多个强信号（油轮被击、IAEA核材料报告、领导人声明）"
}
```
